# LessPlasticish

Practical low-plastic swaps for real homes.

## Core pages

- Home: https://lessplasticish.com/
- Start Here After The Plastic Detox: https://lessplasticish.com/start-here-after-the-plastic-detox
- Starter Swap List: https://lessplasticish.com/starter-swap-list
- Water Filter Swaps: https://lessplasticish.com/water-filter-swaps-plastic-bottle-waste
- Starter Checklist: https://lessplasticish.com/starter-checklist
- About: https://lessplasticish.com/about
- Affiliate & Health Disclosure: https://lessplasticish.com/disclosure

## Brand positioning

Less plastic, less panic. Practical swaps for water, food storage, reheating, and everyday kitchen routines. Educational content only; not medical advice.
